column1: # WYSIWYG `:Format Bold Set` on a labeled cell.
# Entered via the colon-menu (R3.4a WYSIWYG), POINT-committed on A1.
# `:` enters WYSIWYG menu mode, `F` descends to :Format,
# `B` to :Format Bold, `S` to :Format Bold Set.  Line-3 preview
# should surface the current leaf as we descend.
# Drops into POINT waiting for a range.
